title: SlashBlade Fabric Addons
description: An addon pack of SlashBlade-Refabricated, which includes some addons of SlashBlade-Resharped.
body:
This mod is an addon pack of [SlashBlade-Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/slashblade-refabricated) that added new SlashBlade, SE, etc., which includes some addons of [SlashBlade-Resharped](https://modrinth.com/mod/slashblade-resharped), so you can get the detail from original addon.

Now including:
- [Japanese Addon Pack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sjap) 
- [CialloBlade](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cialloblade)
- [EnergyBlade(HF Blade)](https://modrinth.com/mod/energyblade)
- [YakumoBlade](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/yakumoblade)
- and more soon...
